rows.notes: Page title at top. Handwriting partly stylized (looks like Latin/old English spelling). No amounts present. Letters mostly legible but final word ambiguous between 'recipienda' and 'recipienda' — chosen reading based on letter shapes.

Amount columns are well aligned to ruling lines; reads clearly as '30 0 0'. Description is legible but first word uncertain (interpreted as 'Gwycar'); labeled as entry because it is a transaction line.
Amounts clearly '60 0 0' and align with vertical column lines. Description reads 'Kidlington Rect. pro Trien:' reasonably clearly; minor uncertainty in reading 'Rect.' abbreviation.
Amount clearly '62 6 0'. Description reading 'Southrevington Rect.' chosen from letters visible; small ambiguity in place spelling but context (Rect. pro dimid: Ann:) is clear.
Amount reads as '7 0 4½' with clear half-penny loop after the pence digit; columns align well. Description partly uncertain (reads like 'Kidlington Mills') but context of 'pro dimid: ann:' is clear.

Numerical cluster reads as '7 3 0' with a small loop after the pence interpreted as three‑quarters of a penny (0.75) — fraction is faint but shape matches '3q' style. Description is uncertain: looks like 'Garsington' then occupational name (read here as 'Sadler') but handwriting ambiguous.
Amount '6 12 0' is well aligned and unambiguous. Description reads as 'Clifton Ferry pro Ann:' fairly clearly.
Amount appears as '6 10 8' with clear digits and column alignment. Description likely 'Cheston' or similar rectoral name; 'Rect. pro Ann:' clear. Moderate certainty on place spelling.

Amount cluster reads '7 3 0' with a faint three‑quarter mark after the pence interpreted as 0.75. Description uncertain (handwriting looks like 'Garsington Pricket' or 'Prickett'); chosen reading based on letter shapes but ambiguous.
Amount clearly '28 3 10½' — half‑penny symbol visible. Description reading 'Cheve Hicks' is approximate (letters readable but archaic spelling); 'pro Trien:' is clear.
Amount '8 6 1' is legible and aligned to columns. Description shows 'pro Ann: & Dimid:' clearly; place name read as 'Bensington' with moderate confidence.
Amount '2 3 0' clear. Description looks like 'Southrevington for Ten. pro Ann:' (tenant/rent entry); some words abbreviated but reading consistent with context.
Short entry with very clear '1 0 0' amount and legible place name 'Bampton pro Ann:'. Low ambiguity.

Amount reads '10 15 5½' with visible half‑penny loop. Description is fairly unclear (hand shapes read something like 'Titchfield Napper pro beic & dimd'); interpreted conservatively — spelling of names uncertain.
Amount '6 14 1' is well aligned and legible. Description reads as 'Strode pro Peters:' though the second word could be 'Peters' or 'Petersen' — chosen based on letter shapes.
Amount '1 18 0' clear. Description short but the place/name 'Kemps' is somewhat abbreviated/uncertain — moderate confidence.
Amount '4 0 0' clear. Description is quite ambiguous (handwritten place name unclear — rendered here as 'Montecute pro Pcten:') so lower confidence on text but numbers are certain.
Amount '9 6 8' legible. Description line contains multiple names/terms in cramped handwriting ('Ladline' / 'Shewen Comyns') which are uncertain — read cautiously from letter forms.
Amount '6 13 4' clear and aligns with ruling. Description shows two names joined by '&' — 'Conyers & Donathlen' is the best reading of the script though second name letters are slightly indistinct.
Amount '1 16 4' clearly visible. Description likely 'Greenhow pro Ann:' reading is plausible from letter shapes; moderate confidence.
Amount '1 8 4' clear. Description looks like an honorific 'Mr' followed by surname (read as 'Sleek'); surname moderately legible.
Amount '3 6 8' clear and valid. Description reads like an abbreviated college name 'Hert. Coll.' (Hertford College?) — abbreviation is readable though exact institution uncertain.
Amount '0 10 0' (ten shillings) clearly visible. Description 'Jesus Coll: pro Ann:' is familiar and quite legible.
Amount '3 0 0' clear. Description appears as 'Fotherwan' (place name) with 'pro dimid: Ann:' clear; spelling of place uncertain so moderate confidence.
Amount '5 0 0' clearly visible. Description likely 'With Arish pro Ann:' or similar; handwriting for first word ambiguous (could be 'Witt' or 'With').
Amount '15 0 0' is clear. Description reads as 'Thrift Assembly pro Trien:' with good legibility; small chance of alternate spelling but context makes meaning clear.
Amount '2 0 0' clear. Name 'Lucas Eaton' reads well from the script; high confidence in both name and amount.

rows.description: House at the back gate pro Ann & Dimid:
rows.notes: Amount '9 0 0' clear and aligned. Description 'House at the back gate pro Ann & Dimid:' readable though spaced longhand; moderate-high confidence.

rows.description: Mr. Seywood pro Trien. Copon included
rows.notes: Amount '6 0 6' clear (six pence visible). Description reads as 'Mr Seywood pro Trien' with trailing note 'Copon included' faint but legible; some minor uncertainty in surname spelling ('Seywood').
